title: leontodon hellenicus
intro: Leontodon hellenicus, also known as the Greek hawk's beard or Hellenic dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Leontodon hellenicus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
